And like the biggest factor.
After sort of that drive these symptoms that they experience is through changes in their hormonal life stage.

So when you sort of look at the supplement category today, with the exception of like sort of multivitamins, specifically targeting like women sort of 55 plus, that no one's really like directly going after hormonal stages.
There's prenatals, obviously, but like no one's really going after and building around these hormonal life stages.
And so that was one key insight.
The other insight was around there's a lot of like great supplements.

So I was literally looking at this earlier.
Exactly.
looking

However, like the people that we're going after, women actually like don't want to consume gummies, let alone like a lot of gummies, like they're loaded with sugar.
And for you to actually get kind of all the nutrients that you need, you'd have to consume like multiple packs of gummies.
And so it's like, do you actually want to do that?
And so we came up with a different form factor, which is in the form of an effervescent beverage.
